description_long: This object is a large, spiral-shaped pastry with a golden-brown exterior and a generous layer of creamy white icing drizzled over the top and sides. The surface is uneven and textured, with visible swirls and folds characteristic of a cinnamon roll, and the icing appears to have melted slightly, seeping into the crevices. The pastry is thick and dense, with some areas showing a soft, doughy interior peeking through the outer crust. The icing is concentrated on the upper surface, creating a glossy, slightly sticky appearance, while the bottom and sides are more matte and baked. The overall shape is irregular, with one side slightly more rounded and the other more angular, suggesting a hand-formed, artisanal quality. The coloration ranges from light tan to deep golden brown, with the icing providing a stark white contrast.
description: A large, spiral cinnamon roll pastry with golden-brown crust and thick white icing, featuring a dense, textured surface and visible swirls.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiral pattern and thick icing concentrated on the top and left side, with a rugged, uneven surface.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the central swirl and the icing pooling in the crevices, with more of the pastry's interior exposed.
description_view_2: The spiral is clearly visible, with a smooth, rounded edge and a thick layer of icing covering most of the top.
description_view_3: Side view reveals a more solid, rounded exterior with less visible icing and a smoother, golden-brown surface.
